component.name: Real-Time Upscaler for Linux
component.summary: Real‑time AI upscaling overlay for any X11 window

description.p: A real-time AI upscaler for any application window on GNU/Linux. It uses CuNNy neural networks to perform 2x (or 4x) upscaling, then scales the result to full screen while preserving aspect ratio. Mouse clicks and motion are automatically forwarded to the original window.

screenshot.caption: Main window, showing available applications to upscale.
